name: the Cinderward Signet
description: A broad signet of slag-grey metal, its face stamped with the barred sigil the slagborn wear branded into their hides. Prised from a brute in the Cinder Reaches and still warm to the touch, it holds a banked, ruinous heat that meets an incoming flame head-on and swallows it, so a wearer can stand in the scourging ember-storms of the black glass and not be flayed to the bone.
